commands.review_summary:
The PR extracts gateway protocol code into `packages/gateway-protocol`, gateway client/runtime helpers into `packages/gateway-client`, keeps `src/gateway/client.ts` as the OpenClaw wrapper, and updates build, docs, imports, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch review: source inspection shows `packages/gateway-client/src/client.ts` misses current `fe80::/10` parity and the PR head omits `packages/gateway-client/src/**` from routing scopes. I did not execute the PR head because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can address the missing route scopes and IPv6 classifier parity; maintainers still need to accept the broader package boundary.
